label: NetAlertX
info: CARD-0063 — translates NetAlertX's raw system-sensors/# MQTT firehose (~95 msgs/scan) into diff-based transition events on jctsh/components/netalertx/log, plus a 5-minute heartbeat on jctsh/components/netalertx/heartbeat (picked up automatically by the watchdog flow's jctsh/+/+/heartbeat wildcard).

name: Transition detection (diff against cached prior state — no mirroring)
fn_device_info (cache attrs, detect new-device)
fn_presence (diff is_present)
fn_heartbeat (build log + heartbeat payloads)
